description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the daewok/lisp-devel Docker image and define two stages: build and test. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y git-core, and make install for every job. In the build stage, add a build job that executes make build and publishes the bookshops directory as an artifact. No additional services, caches, rules, or deployment targets are configured.
